entry.title: New: Bill 6 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING, HOUSING PROGRAM, GENERAL" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget to increase the equivalent personnel from 17 to 23 in the Department of Housing.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
